status_legend.active: The one feature currently being worked.
status_legend.blocked: Progress is stopped by a documented blocker.
status_legend.passing: Verification passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Repository harness operating layer
features.user_visible_behavior: A new agent can start from repo files, choose one scoped objective, run verification, and leave a clean handoff without relying on chat history.
verification: Root instructions route to state, startup, verification, and done criteria
POSIX and PowerShell verification entrypoints run the full local check set
Harness docs include manifest, component inventory, verification matrix, evidence log, security map, and lifecycle files
Harness audit passes the configured threshold
evidence: 2026-06-14: latest repo-harness-creator audit reported 100/100 after release control and agent threat-boundary updates
features.notes: This feature addresses the audit bottleneck reported before harness adoption.

features.title: Provider egress allowlisting
features.user_visible_behavior: Internet-enabled agent runs can be restricted to reviewed provider and package endpoints instead of unrestricted egress.
verification: Runtime smoke proves denied and allowed network paths
features.notes: Current internet mode remains unrestricted egress and is documented as a known limitation.

features.title: Project logo integration
features.user_visible_behavior: The project README displays the maintained repository logo from a tracked asset path.
verification: README references the logo with alt text
Harness manifest requires the logo asset
Image dimensions and format are verified
evidence: 2026-06-14: visual inspection passed via local image viewer
2026-06-14: latest repo-harness-creator audit reported 100/100 with the logo in the manifest
features.notes: The source download image was normalized to a stripped 512x512 PNG; the original file was not modified.
